subcodes.first_line: O thou who art newly come to the Faith! Thy letter, written with musk-scented pen, that sign of the love of God, was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قریب العهد من شرب اللبن اثر قلم مسکی الرقم آن ایت محبت الله ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
